raw.subject: Your Lexington page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

Your Lexington page caught my eye because of the way you highlighted the authentic Brazilian barbecue experience you offer at Cecis Grill House Food Truck. I loved seeing the photo of your beautifully grilled meats and the vibrant colors of the dishes.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be making it harder for customers in Lexington to find and order from you directly.

I took a closer look at your Facebook posts and was inspired to sketch out a simple homepage idea that showcases your menu, hours, and even a photo gallery of your delicious food. It includes a menu hero section and a map to help customers find you.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/cecis-grill-house-food-truck-lexington

I'd love to discuss how a simple website like this could help you reach more customers in Lexington. I offer a flat fee for local businesses, and I'd be happy to answer any questions you have.

Reply to get a quote or let's schedule a quick call to discuss further.
